title: Debris Zone
description:
Debris Zone is a top-down multiplayer space shooter set in a galaxy of drifting wreckage, contested territory, and trigger-happy pilots. Jump through portals into a connected world of open maps, each packed with enemies, loot, and lurking bosses, then fight in fast, skill-based dogfights where managing your shields and hull is the difference between a clean kill and a trip back to the repair station. 

Customize your ship with lasers, shields, engines, amors and drones, hunt for gear to push your build further, and take on towering boss encounters with serious rewards. Earn gems, gold, and experience as you complete quests, climb the ranks, and unlock prestige titles to flaunt above your ship - all in a persistent online galaxy where every other pilot is a potential ally or you next target. 

Suit up, pilot. The Debris Zone is waiting.
description_short: Debris Zone is a top-down multiplayer space shooter set in a galaxy of wreckage and rival pilots. Jump between contested maps, customize your ship with lasers, shields, and drones, hunt epic bosses for loot, and fight to climb the ranks in fast, real-time dogfights.
